title: Foxg1 regulation of translation: RNASeq data
author: Mallamaci, Antonello
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Osvaldo Artimagnella & Antonello Mallamaci.   Foxg1 regulation of translation: RNASeq data  
 It includes raw: (1) Total (totRNA) (2) Translating Ribosome Affinity Purification (trapRNA) (3) RNA ImmunoPrecipitation (ripRNA) sequence data, referred to by: Osvaldo Artimagnella, Elena Sabina Maftei, Mauro Esposito, Remo Sanges, Antonello Mallamaci. " Foxg1 regulates translation of neocortical neuronal genes, including the main NMDA receptor subunit gene, Grin1 ". (submitted).
